title: Fino Shiseido Premium Touch Conditioner 550ml
bodyHtml: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Hair Conditioner is a luxurious treatment designed specifically for dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair. Infused with powerful ingredients like Royal Jelly, PCA, and Lipidure, this conditioner deeply moisturizes, strengthens, and repairs your hair from the core. It helps combat damage from environmental factors like UV rays, as well as from chemical treatments such as coloring or perming. The formula works effortlessly to hydrate each strand, leaving your hair soft, shiny, and manageable. With its delicate floral scent, it transforms your hair care routine into a spa-like experience, while providing lasting nourishment, repair, and protection for vibrant, healthy hair.
excerpt: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Hair Conditioner is a luxurious treatment designed specifically for dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair. Infused with powerful ingredients like Ro

title: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Moisturizing Hair Shampoo 550ml
bodyHtml: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Moisturizing Hair Shampoo is a luxurious solution for dry, damaged, or chemically treated hair. Formulated with a unique blend of Royal Jelly EX, PCA, and Lipidure EX, it deeply moisturizes, strengthens, and repairs hair from the core. It is specifically designed to address damage caused by UV rays, weather changes, and hair treatments such as coloring or perming. Royal Jelly EX delivers intense hydration, while PCA fortifies hair strands for enhanced strength and resilience. Lipidure EX focuses on repairing and restoring hair structure, leaving it smooth and healthy. It revitalizes hair and enhances manageability, making it ideal for daily use or intensive care routines, leaving hair soft, nourished, and radiant.
excerpt: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Moisturizing Hair Shampoo is a luxurious solution for dry, damaged, or chemically treated hair. Formulated with a unique blend of Royal Jelly EX, PCA, a

title: Fino Shiseido Premium Touch Hair Oil
bodyHtml: Fino Shiseido Premium Touch Hair Oil is an intensive damage-repairing treatment designed to keep your hair smooth and healthy. Its concentrated formula targets even the smallest signs of damage, repairing and coating the hair cuticle to maintain smoothness. Despite its rich texture, the oil delivers a non-sticky, lightweight finish. The refined, graceful floral scent adds a touch of elegance while nourishing your hair. This Japanese hair oil is ideal for damaged hair and split ends, sealing each hair shaft to protect from further damage. Suitable for all hair types, it can be used on towel-dried hair or after styling for added shine and manageability, leaving no greasy residue. The pump dispenser offers easy application, and it works to strengthen and repair hair while enhancing its natural shine.
excerpt: Fino Shiseido Premium Touch Hair Oil is an intensive damage-repairing treatment designed to keep your hair smooth and healthy. Its concentrated formula targets even the smallest si

title: Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Mask 230g
bodyHtml:
Shiseido Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask is a luxurious deep-conditioning treatment designed to restore life to dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair. Infused with a blend of repairing and moisturizing ingredients, this rinse-off hair mask penetrates deeply into each strand to replenish lost moisture, smooth rough cuticles, and repair structural damage caused by styling, coloring, or environmental stress.

Its rich, creamy texture coats the hair evenly, delivering salon-quality care at home. With regular use, hair regains its natural elasticity, softness, and healthy shine. Suitable for all hair types in need of intense repair, this nourishing mask transforms brittle, lifeless strands into silky, manageable locks.

Packaged in a generous 230g jar, it provides long-lasting care, making it an essential addition to your weekly haircare routine.

title: Marvis Ginger Mint Toothpaste (25ml)
bodyHtml:
Elevate your daily oral care routine with the invigorating blend of Marvis Ginger Mint Toothpaste. Infused with the warm, spicy essence of ginger and the refreshing burst of mint, this uniquely crafted toothpaste delivers a revitalizing brushing experience like no other.

Immerse yourself in the aromatic fusion of ginger and mint as you brush, leaving your mouth feeling refreshed and your breath irresistibly fragrant throughout the day. The compact 25ml size makes it perfect for travel or for those seeking a convenient on-the-go oral care solution.

Experience the epitome of Italian luxury in dental care with Marvis.

Key Features:

  • Unique blend of ginger and mint for a revitalizing brushing experience
  • Warm, spicy aroma of ginger combined with the refreshing burst of mint
  • Leaves mouth feeling refreshed and breath irresistibly fragrant
  • Compact 25ml size ideal for travel and on-the-go oral care

Unleash the invigorating power of ginger and mint with Marvis Ginger Mint Toothpaste and discover a new level of freshness in your smile.
